allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
\(Get-Content -Path ''index.html'' -Raw\) -replace ''required>nn\\s*<label for=""email"">Email :</label>n\\s*<input type=""email"" id=""email"" name=""email"" required>nn\\s*<label for=""services"">'', ''required>

                <label for=""email"">Email :</label>
                <input type=""email"" id=""email"" name=""email"" required>

                <label for=""services"">'' | Set-Content -Path ''index.html'' -NoNewline
")
Bash(for file in cordiste-*.html entreprise-*.html maintenance-*.html nettoyage-*.html peinture-*.html pose-*.html ravalement-*.html installation-*.html urgence-*.html devis-*.html)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Mise a jour formulaires avec webhook WebPrime

- Remplacement FormSubmit par webhook WebPrime
- Ajout champ email obligatoire
- Nouvelle fonction submitToWebPrime avec gestion erreurs
- Honeypot anti-spam _gotcha
- Correction accents pour compatibilite JS

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Ajout de sections FAQ sur toutes les pages

- FAQ accueil \(index.html\) : cordiste, zones, avantages, devis, urgence
- FAQ entreprise : historique, certifications, batiments, contrats, assurances
- FAQ devis : obtention, tarifs, contrats, engagement, delais
- FAQ services \(10 pages\) : questions specifiques a chaque prestation
- Styles CSS pour FAQ accordion pure CSS \(checkbox hack\)
- Version responsive mobile

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
